description: The Santaiti are a 'ndrina (organized crime clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Seminara, Calabria, Italy. They emerged as a dominant force in the area after winning a feud against the Pellegrino clan in the 1970s. The clan is also present in Liguria and is considered one of the hegemonic 'ndrine of Seminara alongside the Gioffrè. They remain active, with Carmine Demetrio Santaiti as the alleged current boss.
